sum: Compatibility patch adding a new cave entrance to AR2602 in the Forest of Tethyr so Check the Bodies, Tortured Souls / Tortured Souls Lite, and Tashia NPC can all reference the original cave without CLUA console tricks.
no: AR2600/AR2602 area patch for the Forest of Tethyr (BG2 SoA). MUST INSTALL AFTER Check the Bodies (CtB) — per the mod's own readme. Check the Bodies redirects the original cave to AR3530; this patch restores a separate entrance to AR2602 so Tortured Souls (TS-BP / TS Lite) and Tashia can still reference the original cave. If TS-BP is installed, install this after it as well. WeiDU v212 (2009). English only. No active maintenance since 2009 — consider stale.

conflicts.reason: Tethyr Forest Patch MUST install AFTER Check the Bodies — per the patch readme. CtB redirects the original Tethyr Forest cave (AR2602 -> AR3530); this patch adds back a separate entrance so TS-BP/TS Lite and Tashia NPC can still reach AR2602. Without this order, CtB overwrites the patch.
conflicts.source: Tethyr Forest Patch readme (v3b, 2009-11-26): "Install Setup-TethyrForestPatch after you have installed CtB and TS-BP for these two to be fully compatible."

conflicts.reason: Tethyr Forest Patch should install AFTER Tortured Souls Lite (TS-BP equivalent) so the patch's AR2602 entrance is the final state. TS Lite uses AR2602 for quests/scripts.
conflicts.source: Tethyr Forest Patch readme (v3b): "Install Setup-TethyrForestPatch after you have installed CtB and TS-BP for these two to be fully compatible."

conflicts.reason: Tashia NPC uses the original AR2602 area script. Tethyr Forest Patch should install after CtB, which makes Tashia compatible. This conflict is effectively transitive through CtB.
conflicts.source: Tethyr Forest Patch readme (v3b): "In regards to Tashia-Remix, this will also be compatible as long as the patch is installed after CtB as the Tashia mod just uses the area script for AR2602."

ki.description: Tethyr Forest Patch produces no visible errors if installed BEFORE Check the Bodies — it silently patches AR2600, then CtB overwrites the area moments later. Result: no new cave entrance in-game. Always install this AFTER CtB (and after TS-BP/TS Lite if used).
ki.workaround: Install in this order: Check the Bodies -> Tortured Souls Lite (optional) -> Tethyr Forest Patch. Uninstall+reinstall TFP if it was installed too early.
